title: HeriFault
description: Clean default-based PvP texture pack focused on clarity and maximum FPS. Perfect for Bedwars, duels, and all competitive modes.
body:
![HeriFault 1.8.9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e24af5185d8270bd1f05a545b9a817a7a79513e.jpeg)

## Should I use it?
HeriFault is a clean and lightweight **DefaultEdit texture pack** created to enhance PvP gameplay while preserving the original Minecraft aesthetic.  
Perfect for **Bedwars**, SkyWars, duels, and any fast-paced PvP experience — all while staying extremely **smooth and FPS-friendly**.

## 💡 About HeriFault
Most PvP packs change too much of the vanilla style or add unnecessary visual noise that affects performance.  
HeriFault was made to be a **balanced, clean, and optimized default edit** that keeps Minecraft’s charm while improving clarity and competitive visibility.

## ✨ Features
- Clean default-edit aesthetic  
- Enhanced clarity for PvP combat  
- Custom swords and tools  
- Improved particle readability (criticals, hits, etc.)  
- Ultra-lightweight textures for maximum FPS  
- Compatible with all PvP minigames  

## 📌 Perfect For
Players who want a **DefaultEdit PvP experience** with new visuals, better combat awareness, and zero performance loss.
